March 26,2001
Mona Patel
Brown & Wood, LLP
555 California Street
San Francisco, CA 94104-1715
Re:
Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-01-049
Dear Ms. Patel:
This letter confirms your telephone message left for me on March zo,2ool,
noti$ing me that you have withdrawn your request for advice, dated March 5, 2001.
Please do not hesitate to contact our office if you have any other questions
regarding this matter or decide that you require formal advicer relating to the Political
Reform Act.
Sincerely,
Luisa
General
/
By
C. Scott Tocher
Staff Counsel, Legal Division

I:\Adviceltrs\01-049
I Formal written advice confers immunity on the person requesting the advice under Section
83 1 14(b) and Regulation 18329(b)(7), enclosed. Informal assistance, which includes phone advice and
guidance from advice letters written to others, does not provide such immunity. (Regulation 1g329(c)(3).)

sections.question_synthetic: Not applicable - this is a withdrawal of a previous advice request.
sections.conclusion_synthetic: The FPPC acknowledges the withdrawal of the requestor's advice letter request dated March 5, 2001.
sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: Withdrawal letter with no question or conclusion sections. Document confirms telephone notification of withdrawal received March 20, 2001. File reference W-01-049.

embedding.qa_text:
QUESTION: Not applicable - this is a withdrawal of a previous advice request.

CONCLUSION: The FPPC acknowledges the withdrawal of the requestor's advice letter request dated March 5, 2001.
